description_long: This object consists of two rectangular briefcases placed side by side, one in a brown leather finish and the other in a tan suede-like material. Both briefcases have a classic, boxy shape with rounded edges and a sturdy, structured form. Each features a prominent metallic handle on the front, attached with visible hardware, and a metallic latch or lock mechanism directly beneath the handle. The brown briefcase has a glossy, polished surface, while the tan one has a matte, textured appearance. There are no visible external pockets, brand logos, or corner reinforcements on either briefcase. The overall design is utilitarian and professional, suitable for carrying documents or personal items in an urban environment.
description: Two rectangular briefcases, one brown and glossy, the other tan and matte, each with a metallic handle and latch on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing both briefcases side by side, highlighting their metallic handles and latches.
description_view_1: Side view with the brown briefcase in the foreground and the tan one behind, showing their depth and boxy profiles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both briefcases, with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the tan briefcase in the foreground, emphasizing the texture and lack of external features.
attribute_handle_type: Both briefcases have a single, fixed, U-shaped metallic handle attached to the front with metal brackets.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Both briefcases feature a single metallic latch lock mechanism located directly beneath the handle.
